description: Load the Human AChE-donepezil complex (PDB: 4EY7). Measure the physical distance spanning the catalytic gorge, specifically between the alpha carbon (CA) of the Peripheral Anionic Site residue Trp286 and the alpha carbon (CA) of the Catalytic Active Site residue Trp86. Identify all protein residues making close contacts (within 4.0 Angstroms) with the donepezil ligand (Residue Name: E20). Write a plain-text structural report to '~/PyMOL_Data/ache_binding_report.txt' containing the measured distance in Angstroms and a list of at least 5 specific protein residues interacting with the drug. Finally, create a publication-quality visualization showing the protein and the drug clearly visible inside the deep gorge (e.g., using a transparent surface or clipping planes), and save it as a PNG to '~/PyMOL_Data/images/ache_gorge.png'.
